glosses.ja: 安全; セキュリティ

sentences.target: Je vérifie la sécurité des portes.

translations.fr: Je vérifie la sécurité des portes.
translations.en: I check that the doors are secure.
translations.es: Me aseguro de que las puertas estén bien cerradas.
translations.de: Ich überprüfe, ob die Türen sicher sind.
translations.it: Controllo che le porte siano chiuse a chiave.
translations.ru: Я проверяю, что двери надёжно закрыты.
translations.pt: Verifico se as portas estão bem trancadas.
translations.vi: Tôi kiểm tra xem các cửa có an toàn không.
translations.nl: Ik controleer of de deuren goed afgesloten zijn.
translations.hu: Ellenőrzöm, hogy az ajtók rendesen be vannak zárva.
translations.hi: मैं यह जाँचता हूँ कि दरवाज़े अच्छी तरह से बंद हैं.
translations.pl: Sprawdzam, czy drzwi są dobrze zamknięte.
translations.el: Ελέγχω ότι οι πόρτες είναι κλειδωμένες.
translations.nb: Jeg sjekker at dørene er ordentlig låst.
translations.id: Saya memeriksa apakah pintu sudah terkunci dengan baik.
translations.sv: Jag kontrollerar att dörrarna är ordentligt låsta.
translations.ro: Verific că ușile sunt bine încuiate.
translations.cs: Kontroluji, zda jsou dveře dobře zamčené.
translations.da: Jeg tjekker, at dørene er ordentligt låst.
translations.ja: ドアがきちんと施錠されているか確認します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) in preverbal position; agrees with the finite verb.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular); transitive, taking 'la sécurité' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the noun 'sécurité'.
Common noun (feminine); head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition 'de' contracted with definite article 'les'; marks a nominal complement ('des portes') modifying 'sécurité'.
Common noun (feminine plural); object of the preposition 'des'.

sentences.target: Tu oublies la sécurité en ligne.

translations.fr: Tu oublies la sécurité en ligne.
translations.es: Te olvidas de la seguridad en línea.
translations.vi: Bạn quên an toàn trên mạng.
translations.uk: Ти забуваєш про безпеку в інтернеті.
translations.hi: तुम ऑनलाइन सुरक्षा भूल जाते हो.
translations.sv: Du glömmer bort säkerhet på nätet.
translations.ja: オンラインの安全を忘れている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular).
Finite verb in present indicative (2nd person singular); transitive, with 'la sécurité' as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'sécurité'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'oublies'.
Preposition introducing the PP 'en ligne'; modifies 'sécurité' to specify domain ('online').
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'en' within the PP.

sentences.target: On parle de sécurité au travail.

translations.fr: On parle de sécurité au travail.
translations.en: We're talking about safety at work.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de seguridad en el trabajo.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über Sicherheit am Arbeitsplatz.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在讨论工作中的安全。
translations.ru: Мы говорим о безопасности на работе.
translations.pt: Estamos falando sobre segurança no trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về an toàn tại nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن السلامة في العمل.
translations.nl: We praten over veiligheid op het werk.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про безпеку на роботі.
translations.hi: हम काम पर सुरक्षा के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om sikkerhet på jobb.
translations.id: Kami membicarakan keselamatan di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om säkerheten på jobbet.
translations.ro: Vorbim despre siguranța la locul de muncă.
translations.da: Vi taler om sikkerhed på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場の安全について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; controls 3rd person singular agreement.
Finite verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); takes prepositional complements.
Preposition marking topic/content; introduces the noun 'sécurité'.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'de'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing locative PP 'au travail'.
Common noun (masculine); object of 'au'; denotes the workplace.

sentences.target: Ils veulent plus de sécurité ici.

translations.fr: Ils veulent plus de sécurité ici.
translations.ko: 그들은 여기에서 더 많은 보안을 원해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们想要这里加强安保。
translations.yue: 佢哋想呢度有更多保安措施。
translations.vi: Họ muốn nhiều an ninh hơn ở đây.
translations.ar: هم يريدون مزيدًا من الأمن هنا.
translations.hi: वे यहाँ अधिक सुरक्षा चाहते हैं.
translations.nb: De vil ha mer sikkerhet هنا.
translations.id: Mereka ingin lebih banyak keamanan di sini.
translations.sv: De vill ha mer säkerhet här.
translations.ro: Ei vor mai multă securitate aici.
translations.da: De vil have mere sikkerhed her.
translations.ja: 彼らはここでより多くの安全を求めています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural, masculine).
Finite verb in present indicative (3rd person plural); main predicate taking a noun phrase complement.
Adverb of degree/quantifier modifying the following 'de' + noun construction.
Preposition used after 'plus' to introduce the measured noun.
Common noun (feminine); complement of 'de' in the quantifier construction.
Adverb of place; modifies the clause to indicate location.
